title: 9 Herbal Essential Oils For Oily Hair
description: Eucalyptus globulus essential oils contains cineole, limonene, and alpha-pinene as its main active constituents. These compounds have decongestant and antiseptic properties, which help to reduce oil production in the scalp. Cineole, in particular, has a stimulating effect on the scalp, promoting blood flow and helping to break down excess sebum. This makes eucalyptus globulus essential oils an effective natural treatment for oily hair, helping to balance the scalp's natural oil product...
